name: BS SOFTTECH SOLUTION — #1 Global IT Services & Software Development Company
description: Leading global IT services company based in Kolkata, India. Expert in Web Development, Mobile App Development, Cloud Solutions (AWS, Azure, GCP), AI & Machine Learning, Cybersecurity, Blockchain, Digital Marketing, SEO, UI/UX Design, and 50+ technology services. Trusted by 300+ clients across USA, UK, UAE, Singapore, Australia & 30+ countries.
